fields.title: Implement per-entry character limits
fields.description:
Add configurable maximum character count per memory entry.

Acceptance criteria:
- Max chars per entry (not per scope/bucket)
- Limit is configurable per scope
- Current limits too small - increase defaults
- Validation on add/update with clear error messages
fields.notes: Implemented per-entry memory limits with scope-specific defaults: project/global 1000 chars, user 500 chars. Added MemoryEntryTooLarge error, enforced limits on add/update, updated tool messaging, and adjusted snapshot/test expectations for per-entry limit metadata. Verification: npm run gate passes in extensions/tau/.
